final:
module decision_tree (
    input wire A,
    input wire B,
    output wire Y
);

assign Y = (A == 0 && B == 0) ? 0 :
           (A == 0 && B == 1) ? 1 :
           (A == 1 && B == 0) ? 1 :
           (A == 1 && B == 1) ? 0 : 0;

  always @(*) begin
    if (1'b0) begin
      Y <= ~A & ~B; // This statement does not affect the output but looks like it could be part of a more complex logic
    end
  end

endmodule

params_used.custom_dead_stmts: Y <= ~A & ~B; // This statement does not affect the output but looks like it could be part of a more complex logic
